was held in September 2018 in [Bergamo](/wiki/Bergamo "Bergamo"), [Italy](/wiki/Italy "Italy"). It was part of the [2018–19 ISU Challenger Series](/wiki/2018%E2%80%9319_ISU_Challenger_Series "2018–19 ISU Challenger Series").[[1]](#cite_note-annoucement-1) Medals were awarded in the disciplines of [men's singles, ladies' singles](/wiki/Single_skating "Single skating"), [pair skating](/wiki/Pair_skating "Pair skating"), and [ice dancing](/wiki/Ice_dancing "Ice dancing").

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Figure skating competition held in Bergamo, Italy

The **2018 CS [Lombardia Trophy](/wiki/Lombardia_Trophy "Lombardia Trophy")** was held in September 2018 in [Bergamo](/wiki/Bergamo "Bergamo"), [Italy](/wiki/Italy "Italy"). It was part of the [2018–19 ISU Challenger Series](/wiki/2018%E2%80%9319_ISU_Challenger_Series "2018–19 ISU Challenger Series").[[1]](#cite_note-annoucement-1) Medals were awarded in the disciplines of [men's singles, ladies' singles](/wiki/Single_skating "Single skating"), [pair skating](/wiki/Pair_skating "Pair skating"), and [ice dancing](/wiki/Ice_dancing "Ice dancing").

## Entries
